author: Rachel
body:
Oh my God Burgo!! I took a break from the studies to check out your new posts, and my heart is bursting. Yellow AND Fix You?? Too much for this girl.

Again, thanks for the sharing. I’m so glad you were able to experience that Coldplay grandeur. :)

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Rachel,  
Thanks for stopping by! Coincidental time to take a break from your studies to check for new posts, I just realised today that it had been nearly a month since my last post :P

author: Wicked Mike
body: ‘Fix You’ was easily their greatest song until Viva La Vida where they made more gems than ever before. They may have stolen from other bands but they stole well. ‘Lost’ is my favourite their. Love to see those two songs live. You lucky man. Did you go see My Morning Jacket?

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Mike,  
Thanks for leaving a comment… how’s the hunger strike going?  
And yeah, I _did_ go to see My Morning Jacket, when they opened for Neil Young… Jim James was incendiary! You can see a (short) write up here: [Neil Young & My Morning Jacket, live at the Brisbane Entertainment Centre](/2009/01/22/neil-young-my-morning-jacket-brisbane-entertainment-centre/)

author: Wicked Mike
body:
Hungry:) 2 radio stations have broadcast it and a 3rd will do on Saturday. Of course KZN hasn’t:) A paper may carry somethin on Sunday.

I watched a Neil Young dvd a fortnight ago. Was in mixed mine’s but nice to see he played the best songs from there at the gig you went to. Haven’t quite made up my mind on My Morning Jacket but they are classy. ‘It Beats for You’ is a good song.

author: Burgo
body: Nice one man… you should consider getting on twitter and broadcasting it through there.

author: Wicked Mike
body:
Ha, timing. Twitter is today’s job. I do something everyday. As i’m on a 30kbps connection, [http://www.youtube.com/playsouthafricaloud](http://www.youtube.com/playsouthafricaloud) took 2 days to set up. Enjoy it.

Back to Twitter, it helps more if others send it out!

author: Jess
body: i was at the same concert as you, and oh my god. i still cant put words to how amazing it was. they didnt need expensive costumes or cool effects, it was just them on stage, and that was all they needed. i never wanted the night to end, ever.

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Jess,  
Thanks for stopping by (and bringing the comments back on topic :P)  
Glad you felt the same way about the night. Are you based in Brissie then?
